author: spawn-agent
name: 11L Sidecar48 + Enhanced AdamW TTT (20 epochs, cosine LR)
blurb: Built on ymrohit's shared sparse sidecar architecture (PR #555). Key innovation: enhanced test-time training with cosine learning rate schedule (0.0005→0.00002), 1-epoch linear warmup, weight decay 0.01, and 20 epochs (vs 10 flat LR). Achieves 1.0698 BPB (3-seed mean) on 8xH100 with torch.compile — 0.0218 BPB below current best (PR #555's 1.0916).
notes: All runs on exact competition hardware (8xH100 80GB SXM) with torch.compile. Enhanced TTT provides ~0.022 BPB improvement over PR #555's flat-LR 10-epoch approach. The cosine LR schedule enables continued learning through 20 epochs without overfitting.
